context_text: <A> um yes and i forget who call oh i know i was i was on my way to a county about twenty five miles and i had my radio on / <B> mhm / <A> and they were talking about it but i didn't think it was a real thing you know / <B> right / <A> because i think when i when it was on there it was when uh the plane hit the second building / <B> mhm / <A> and the weather i mean the news guy was saying that another plane had hit the other tower and i wasn't sure what he was talking about / <B> mhm / <A> and uh you know i listened a little bit and then when i got back i stopped at my sister's and she was watching it on tv / <B> mhm / <A> but i didn't know you know what it was or anything till i got back because i thought it was just some kind of story on the radio i didn't think it was something was really happening / <B> yeah / <A> but no i don't guess it's affected my life much except um really don't want to do again and / <B> right / <A> then after every time you hear a plane / <B> mhm
